author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit e983575. Workspace 0.3.0 -> 0.3.1 (5 strings, bumped with ripsed itself; 6 lockfile members updated incl. fuzz). CHANGELOG: the two #114 fix entries moved OUT of the published [0.3.0] section into a new [0.3.1] - 2026-06-10 — the released 0.3.0 doesn't contain them, so its notes must not claim them. Verified: 25 suites green, clippy -D warnings clean, fmt clean. Patch bump correct: bug fixes only, no API changes.
